title: Acceptance Criteria (chain spec / 합격 기준)
description: v2.0 chain harness 의 spec stage 산출물. Gherkin BDD 형식. AC-* 가 ≥ 1 BHV-* + ≥ 1 UC-* backward + ≥ 1 TC-* forward link 의무. DEC-2026-05-06-v2.0-i-strict-채택 정합. v11.0.0 MAJOR 확장 (DEC-2026-05-26-discovery-spec-rename + DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 1 hard gate + DEC-2026-05-26-be-fe-산출물-분리 §결단 #6 Story cross-cut anchor) — derivation_source.discovery_spec_path rename + criteria[] 안 layer + story_ref + openapi_path + operationId + state_map_ref + dtcg_token_ref + visual_manifest_ref 본격 if/then 강제.

discovery_spec_path.description: v11.0.0 rename — chain discovery backward link — discovery-spec.json path. 이전 명명 `planning_spec_path` 본격 폐기 (DEC-2026-05-26-discovery-spec-rename).

behavior_ref.description: chain spec backward link 의무 (chain-coverage-validator 강제)

gherkin.description: Cucumber Gherkin 표준 (사실상 표준 / Official research) — Given/When/Then 평문

tags.description: ADR-008 이중 렌더링 — severity 자동 매핑 tag (@must / @should / @nice)

severity.$comment: v4.1.0 — cross-stage 정합 매핑 SSOT = methodology-spec/severity-cross-stage-mapping.md. business-rules.json BR severity 원천 보유 시 must←critical/high · should←medium · nice←low/info default / LLM business_intent 근거 ±1 단계 조정만 허용 (drift 정량 추적).

verifiable.description: B2 정의 명문 — verifiable=true ⇔ ≥ 1 TC-* forward link + automated_runnable=true. false 면 schema validation fail

automated_runnable.description: automated runner 로 실행 가능 여부 (B2)

gate_required.description: Industry — verifiable=true AC 만 chain impl 진입 허용 (Aider /ask↔/code 정합)

related_brs.description: F-SIM-002/004 (2026-05-18): 본 AC 가 검증하는 BR id 목록 — severity max-propagation source + matrix BR 1급 축. BHV.br_refs 와 합집합으로 cell.business_rule_ids 결정. DO-178C requirements axis 정합.

related_aps.description: F-SIM-002 (2026-05-18): 본 AC 가 cover 하는 antipattern id 목록 — severity max-propagation source. F-SIM-001 antipattern-coverage lane 의 backward link source.

code_pointers.description: operation.md 결정 3 + P2 — artifact ↔ code anchor. graph-synthesizer 가 평탄화 / code-pointer-validator 가 검증.

layer.description: v11.0.0 신설 (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 1 hard gate). AC 의 layer 분기 — layer in [be] 시 openapi_path + operationId 본격 required / layer in [fe] 시 state_map_ref + dtcg_token_ref + visual_manifest_ref 본격 required (if/then). cross-cut = Story anchor (BE+FE 모두 포함 시) / layer 부재 = legacy carry (기존 PoC 정합).

story_ref.description: v11.0.0 신설 (DEC-2026-05-26-be-fe-산출물-분리 §결단 #6 + DEC-2026-05-26-ticket-plan-단일 §결단 #6). Story cross-cut anchor — 본 AC 가 속한 Story 매핑 (Jira Story ID 또는 자유 string). Story = BHV/AC 묶음 anchor (BE+FE/DB/E2E 가로지름).

openapi_path.description: v11.0.0 신설 (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 1 hard gate). layer=be 시 본격 required. OpenAPI path (예: /api/password-change).

operationId.description: v11.0.0 신설. layer=be 시 본격 required. OpenAPI operationId (예: changePassword).

state_map_ref.description: v11.0.0 신설. layer=fe 시 본격 required. state-map.json 안 state id ref.

dtcg_token_ref.description: v11.0.0 신설. layer=fe 시 본격 required. DTCG W3C token set ref (예: 'default' 또는 'dark').

visual_manifest_ref.description: v11.0.0 신설. layer=fe 시 본격 required. visual-manifest.json 안 screen id ref.

allOf.$comment: B2 — verifiable=true 시 test_case_refs ≥ 1 + automated_runnable=true 본격 required
v11.0.0 if/then — layer=be 시 openapi_path + operationId 본격 required (DEC-2026-05-26-contract-강제-양-axis §1 layer 1 hard gate). layer 부재 = legacy carry / trigger ❌ — backward-compat 본격 정합.
v11.0.0 if/then — layer=fe 시 state_map_ref + dtcg_token_ref + visual_manifest_ref 본격 required
